summary: Project with a globe tab feature and PWA support. User provided a custom PWA image to replace the generated one, and requested removal of the yellow pulsing dot from the globe tab.
architectural_notes: PWA image is user-provided (external URL), not AI-generated

existing_features.title: Replace the generated PWA icon images with the user-provided image from https://wkeve-6yaaa-aaaaf-qahcq-cai.raw.icp0.io/storage?contentId=kl67x-j6c5g-ptso3-xq4fe-kmcuc-trzl2-nzxqt-qjedv-j3y4m-3746e-tqe-image-29480. Download this image and use it as the PWA icon for both the 256px and 512px entries in frontend/public/manifest.json. Remove any previously generated PWA icon assets and update all references in manifest.json and frontend/index.html accordingly.

Remove the yellow pulsing dot/marker from the Globe tab (GlobeView component). The pulsing dot that appears on the 3D globe to indicate a station's geographic location must be hidden or removed entirely from GlobeView.tsx.
